particulars.description: The sum of £62,500 together with interest accrued now or to be held by the chargee on an account numbered 80267122 and earmarked or designated by reference to the company.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee in relation to a surety bond dated 13TH april 1995 in favour of sovereign housing association limited for £62,500
